actions.action: Improve response times and provide clear updates on issue resolution
actions.rationale: Users have reported slow and poor customer support, with issues taking too long to resolve and delayed responses without proper updates.

actions.action: Enhance transparency of fees and charges associated with withdrawals
actions.rationale: Users have expressed frustration with unclear and high fees, highlighting the need for transparent pricing and clear communication of costs before executing trades.

actions.action: Streamline the user interface and provide better guidance and solutions
actions.rationale: Users have reported a good but simple app experience, but with poor customer support and confusing executive responses, indicating a need for improved guidance and solutions.
